raw: UPDATE: NO PASS IS NEEDED JUST SHOW YOUR LIBRARY CARD Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. No pass is needed. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600. No reservation is required and no pass from the library is needed. Simply present your library card at admissions to receive the 50% discount. All members of your group ages 13+ needs to present a library card to receive the discount.
